heading: Supported Aggregation Pipeline Operators
body:
Atlas Data Federation supports all the aggregation pipeline operators.
However, some operators are only available in queries on collections that are mapped to an Atlas cluster data store.
The [geospatial query operators](manual/geospatial-queries) are only available in such queries.
The following [evaluation query operators](manual/reference/mql/query-predicates) are also restricted to
queries on collections mapped to an Atlas cluster data store:

| Pipeline Stage | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| $geoNear       | Outputs documents in order of nearest to farthest from a specified point. Atlas Data Federation supports $geoNear in queries on virtual collections that are mapped to one or more Atlas collections. Atlas Data Federation doesn't support $geoNear for S3 (Simple Storage Service) or HTTP (HyperText Transport Protocol) federated database instance stores.See Querying Data in Your Atlas Cluster for more information.                         |
| $graphLookup   | Performs a recursive search on a collection. Atlas Data Federation supports $graphLookup in queries on virtual collections that are mapped to one Atlas collection only. Atlas Data Federation doesn't support $graphLookup for:S3 (Simple Storage Service) or HTTP (HyperText Transport Protocol) stores.Queries on virtual collections that are mapped to multiple Atlas collections.See Querying Data in Your Atlas Cluster for more information. |
| $search        | Performs a full-text search on the content of the fields covered by a MongoDB Search index.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| $text          | Performs a text search on the content of the fields indexed with a text index.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| $where         | Passes either a string containing a JavaScript expression or a full JavaScript function to the query system.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

> **Note:** Atlas Data Federation doesn't include a server-side JavaScript engine. So, Atlas Data Federation
> doesn't support operators such as [$where](manual/reference/operator/query/where), [$function](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/function), and
> [$accumulator](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/accumulator) that require
> server-side scripting [enabled](manual/reference/operator/query/where).
